refnamediv.refpurpose: Clears the content of a topo geometry.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Clears the content a turning it into an empty one. Mostly useful in conjunction with to replace the shape of existing objects and any dependent object in higher hierarchical levels.

refsection.title: Examples
refsection.programlisting: -- Shrink all TopoGeometry polygons by 10 meters UPDATE nei_topo SET topo = toTopoGeom(ST_Buffer(topo, -10), clearTopoGeom(topo), 0);
